No matter what it takes visit the desert! 🐪

Fabulous place! Take a tour with the dinner and sunset! 🌅

Uma experiência simplesmente inesquecível!
O deserto de Agafay superou todas as expectativas, com paisagens de cortar a respiração, um pôr do sol mágico. A experiência de moto 4 foi fantástica, bem como o passeio a camelo. Mas o que tornou este passeio verdadeiramente especial foi a energia da equipa, o nosso guia Salah, foi absolutamente excecional do início ao fim. Sempre atento, simpático, divertido e com um conhecimento incrível sobre a região. Fez-nos sentir seguros, bem recebidos e transformou um simples passeio numa memória para a vida. Obrigada por nos proporcionar um dia tão perfeito! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
It was a nice tour.

review:
Un grand merci à toute l’équipe de Agafay Desert pour cette expérience incroyable !
L’accueil, l’organisation et surtout la balade en quad étaient vraiment magnifiques 🔥
Les paysages étaient superbes et les quads au top, on a passé un moment inoubliable.
Je recommande vivement à tous ceux qui veulent vivre une aventure exceptionnelle au désert. Merci encore 🙌

Marouane et son equipe ont été à la fois efficaces et très professionnels.
La base propose  des quad et buggy de très bonne qualité.
L'accompagnement était sûr et adapté au niveau des participants
Je recommande vivement quad aventure et reviendrai définitivement.
One of the best places to relax

C’était une soirée incroyable à Agafay Desert. Tout était parfait : l’ambiance, le personnel, le restaurant… on a vraiment passé un très bon moment. Merci pour l’accueil et l’organisation, c’était une expérience magnifique. À refaire bientôt inchallah !
Amazing 😊
Fantastic place fantastic scenery. I’m friendly people a couple of cafés up there brilliant

Unbelievable experience! The quads were well-maintained and the route was a perfect mix of speed and scenery. Our guide Saad was professional and made sure everyone had a blast. Highly recommend for any thrill-seekers

De woestijn was opzich heel gaaf. Maar dit is in feite een grote touristisch racebaan voor Quads en andere voertuigen. Het geluid draagt heel ver dus je hoort de voertuigen overal. Dat is wel jammer. Het overnachten in de woestijn was wel heel gaaf.

Enjoyed being in this dessert. It’s not more like a sand dessert but it’s more of rocky one.  Good for off-roading, camel ride, buggy ride.
We did have off-road Himalayan bike and did some off-roading on them.

Agafay Desert is truly a must-do experience when visiting Marrakech, Morocco. Just a short drive from the city, you’re transported into a stunning rocky desert landscape that feels calm, magical, and completely different from the busy medina.

The experience started with an adrenaline-filled quad bike ride, racing across the vast desert terrain with breathtaking views all around. It was exciting, fun, and perfect for adventure lovers. After that came a peaceful camel ride at sunset, which felt very traditional and gave us time to soak in the beauty of the desert as the sky changed colors.

The evening ended with an unforgettable desert dinner and live show. The food was delicious, well presented, and filling, and the entertainment made the night even more special. From music and dancing to fire performances, the atmosphere was lively, warm, and beautifully organised under the stars.

Agafay Desert offers the perfect mix of adventure, culture, and relaxation. Whether you’re visiting Marrakech for the first time or returning, this experience is absolutely worth it and one you’ll remember long after your trip ends.

Top expérience en quad
Erg leuk en mooi ! Beter dan de binnenstad.

Agafay desert is a must whenever you visit Marrakech.
The quad biking is an absolute blast with the Atlas Mountains as your backdrop. It’s loud, messy, and a total adrenaline rush but not too fast. Then, you swap the engine for a camel ride to catch the sunset. I'll be honest: camels are bumpy and a little awkward when they stand up. They are tied in a line closer together so you might feel a camel’s mouth on your thigh. Don’t be alarmed. It’s definitely a popular tourist circuit, so don't expect to be the only person out there, but between the dust, the mint tea, and that sunset, it’s a really good experience you shouldn't skip. Just a heads-up: wear long pants and bring a scarf, or can you buy it at one of the stalls there. Buy the ticket for the full experience on GetYourGuide which is actually cheaper (£16 pp)
Camel and ATV ride were amazing

Que c'est beau 🥰

response_of_owner:
Bonjour , 
Nous vous confirmons que vous êtes certainement trompé d’établissement quand vous voulez mettre ton commentaire . Nous avons plus de 200 évaluations , vous ne trouvez aucune critique a notre accueil et hospitalité.Nous somme désoler pour votre expérience mais Prière de revoir le nom de l’établissement ou vous avez réserver pour mettre votre commentaire car y’a beaucoup d’établissement avec le nom AGAFAY .

Cordialement
